chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-231 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.962/2024 2. For hearing of main case 26-03-2024 Mr. Mir Muhammad Shaikh,, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General a/w IO/ Inspector Spbdar Umrani, PS TM. Khan.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Respondent No.5/I.O of Crime No.43/2024, registered at P.S, Tando Masti Khan/PP E.Zone, u/s 365-B PPC, is present and files copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Mirzadi (petitioner No.1) recorded u/s 161 Cr.P.C and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Ghulam Qasim (petitioner No.2) without any pressure, coercion or compulsion, but with her own accord and free will and is leading a happy life with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She further states that her brother respondent No.6 has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted by anyone. I.O further states that he will file copy of such statement along with report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR. Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with the statement of I.O do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of along with listed application with directions to officials respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
